name: Bonnie Complete Chicken Kitten Dry Food 1.5kg
shortDescription: Bonnie Chicken Kitten food , fully balanced, chicken protein-containing all-natural kitten food carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all kitten breeds.
description: Bonnie Chicken Kitten food , fully balanced, chicken protein-containing all-natural kitten food carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all kitten breeds. Chicken meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and Oduor control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimizes animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharride , immune provide beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewers yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ...................36% Fat .......................19% Crude Ash................. 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ... 3.5% INGREDIENTS: Chicken Proteins (dehydrated), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Dried Beet Pulp, Corn Gluten, Liver Flavour, Salt, Linseed, Brewer's Yeast, Taurine, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharides, Beta Glucan, Preservatives - Antioxidants. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Ionide, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
